category_sources: source_facts.description says HID-based USB bootloader for AVR microcontrollers; official OBDEV page says BootloadHID is a USB boot loader for AVR microcontrollers.
display_name_sources: Official OBDEV page heading is BootloadHID; source_facts.executables contains bootloadHID.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OBDEV BootloadHID page and includes usage, downloads, and release notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OBDEV page provides downloadable source archives but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official OBDEV page identify HID USB bootloader support for AVR microcontrollers.
